# File System Manager

This module handles all file system operations with safety checks and validation.

## Features

- Path validation to prevent directory traversal attacks
- Safe file reading and writing
- Directory listing (recursive and non-recursive)
- Binary file detection
- .gitignore pattern support
- File backup and diff application

## Usage

```javascript
const FileSystemManager = require('./FileSystemManager');

const fsManager = new FileSystemManager('/path/to/project');

// Read a file
const content = await fsManager.readFile('src/index.js');

// Write a file
await fsManager.writeFile('output.txt', 'Hello, World!');

// List directory
const files = await fsManager.listDirectory('src', true);

// Check if file exists
const exists = await fsManager.exists('package.json');
```
